features: Early-exit node: greeting/farewell/thanks skip 14 nodes (<1s vs 3-8s)
asyncio.to_thread() + per-user lock in graph_adapter (multi-user concurrency)
_SESSION_STATE: thread-safe LRU cache with TTL eviction (max 1000 entries, 1h TTL)
Deterministic correlation_id for dedup/cache (hash of user+intent+entities+timebucket)
fixes: graph_adapter: FastAPI event loop no longer blocked during graph execution
Legacy orthodoxy status values (locally_blessed, under_review) mapped to canonical enum
breaking_changes: GraphResponseMin replaces GraphResponseSchema as primary API response (legacy keys preserved for backward-compat)

commits.message: feat(graph_flow): early-exit node for simple intents with governance
feat(graph_adapter): asyncio.to_thread + per-user lock for concurrency
feat(graph_runner): thread-safe LRU session cache with TTL eviction

validation: Contract tests: all 5 Orthodoxy statuses validated
Backward compatible: legacy json/human/audit_monitored keys preserved
